languages.text:
The user gains the {g|f:b3617f252b704125bfd60cc4702af97f}Force Couple (Enemy){/g} and the {g|f:cd63f0732da44952a78f7f79e50c737f}Force Couple (Ally){/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g}.
{g|f:edd1a35b92d64bad9aaa09bbaa522797}Force Couple (Enemy){/g} allows the user to attack the target enemy with a melee weapon, if they have one equipped, after the pull. If the user has two weapons equipped, they attack with both of them, but each deals −50% less {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}.
Using either of those abilities sets both of them on {g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}cooldown{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
The user gains the {g|f:b3617f252b704125bfd60cc4702af97f}Forced Hitch (Enemy){/g} and the {g|f:cd63f0732da44952a78f7f79e50c737f}Forced Hitch (Ally){/g} abilities. Using any of those abilities sets both of them on cooldown.
If the user has two melee weapons equipped, they attack with both of them, but each deals −50% less damage.

The user gains the {g|f:b3617f252b704125bfd60cc4702af97f}Forced Hitch (Enemy){/g} and the {g|f:cd63f0732da44952a78f7f79e50c737f}Forced Hitch (Ally){/g} abilities. Using any of those abilities sets both of them on cooldown.
If the user has two melee weapons equipped, they attack with both of them, but each deals −50% less damage.

The user gains the {g|f:b3617f252b704125bfd60cc4702af97f}Force Couple (Enemy){/g} and the {g|f:cd63f0732da44952a78f7f79e50c737f}Force Couple (Ally){/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g}.

The user gains the {g|f:b3617f252b704125bfd60cc4702af97f}Force Couple (Enemy){/g} and the {g|f:cd63f0732da44952a78f7f79e50c737f}Force Couple (Ally){/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g}. Using any of those abilities sets both of them on {g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}cooldown{/g}.
If the user has two {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapons equipped, they attack with both of them, but each deals −50% less {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}.

languages.text:
Обладатель аугмента получает {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}способности{/g} {g|f:edd1a35b92d64bad9aaa09bbaa522797}Принудительная сцепка (с противником){/g} и {g|f:cd63f0732da44952a78f7f79e50c737f}Принудительная сцепка (с союзником){/g}.
{g|f:edd1a35b92d64bad9aaa09bbaa522797}Принудительная сцепка (с противником){/g} позволяет ему подтянуться к выбранному противнику и атаковать его экипированным оружием ближнего боя. Если у обладателя аугмента экипировано два оружия ближнего боя, он атакует обоими, но каждое наносит на 50% меньше {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}урона{/g}.
Использование любой из этих способностей активирует {g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}период восстановления для обеих{/g}.
languages.original_text:
The user gains the {g|f:edd1a35b92d64bad9aaa09bbaa522797}Force Couple (with enemy){/g} and the {g|f:cd63f0732da44952a78f7f79e50c737f}Force Couple (with ally){/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g}.
{g|f:edd1a35b92d64bad9aaa09bbaa522797}Force Couple (with enemy){/g} allows the user to attack the target enemy with a melee weapon, if they have one equipped, after the pull. If the user has two weapons equipped, they attack with both of them, but each deals −50% less {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}.
Using either of those abilities sets both of them on {g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}cooldown{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Обладатель аугмента получает {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}способности{/g} {g|f:b3617f252b704125bfd60cc4702af97f}Принудительная сцепка (враг){/g} и {g|f:cd63f0732da44952a78f7f79e50c737f}Принудительная сцепка (союзник){/g}. Использование любой из этих способностей активирует {g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}период восстановления{/g} для обеих.
Если у обладателя аугмента экипировано два оружия {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}ближнего боя{/g}, он атакует обоими, но каждое наносит на 50% меньше {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}урона{/g}.

Обладатель аугмента получает {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}способности{/g} {g|f:b3617f252b704125bfd60cc4702af97f}Принудительная сцепка (враг){/g} и {g|f:cd63f0732da44952a78f7f79e50c737f}Принудительная сцепка (союзник){/g}. Использование любой из этих способностей активирует {g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}период восстановления{/g} для обеих.
Если у обладателя аугмента экипировано два оружия {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}ближнего боя{/g}, он атакует обоими, но каждое наносит на 50% меньше {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}урона{/g}.

languages.text:
El usuario obtiene las {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacidades{/g} {g|f:edd1a35b92d64bad9aaa09bbaa522797}Par de fuerzas (Enemigo){/g} y {g|f:cd63f0732da44952a78f7f79e50c737f}Par de fuerzas (Aliado){/g}.
{g|f:edd1a35b92d64bad9aaa09bbaa522797}Par de fuerzas (Enemigo){/g} permite al usuario atacar al enemigo objetivo con un arma cuerpo a cuerpo tras la atracción. Si el usuario tiene dos armas equipadas, ataca con ambas, pero cada una inflige un −50 % menos de {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}daño{/g}.
Usar cualquiera de las dos capacidades activa la {g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}recuperación{/g} de ambas.

{g|f:edd1a35b92d64bad9aaa09bbaa522797}Force Couple (with enemy){/g} allows the user to attack the target enemy with a melee weapon, if they have one equipped, after the pull. If the user has two weapons equipped, they attack with both of them, but each deals −50% less {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}.
Using either of those abilities sets both of them on {g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}cooldown{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
El usuario obtiene las {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacidades{/g} {g|f:edd1a35b92d64bad9aaa09bbaa522797}Par de fuerzas (Enemigo){/g} y {g|f:cd63f0732da44952a78f7f79e50c737f}Par de fuerzas (Aliado){/g}.
{g|f:edd1a35b92d64bad9aaa09bbaa522797}Par de fuerzas (Enemigo){/g} permite al usuario atacar al enemigo objetivo con un arma cuerpo a cuerpo tras la atracción. Si el usuario tiene dos armas equipadas, ataca con ambas, pero cada una inflige un −50 % menos de {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}daño{/g}.
Usar cualquiera de las dos capacidades activa la {g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}recuperación{/g} de ambas.

El usuario gana las {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacidades{/g} {g|f:edd1a35b92d64bad9aaa09bbaa522797}Par de fuerzas (Enemigo){/g} y {g|f:cd63f0732da44952a78f7f79e50c737f}Par de fuerzas (Aliado){/g}.
{g|f:edd1a35b92d64bad9aaa09bbaa522797}Par de fuerzas (Enemigo){/g} permite al usuario atacar al enemigo objetivo con un arma cuerpo a cuerpo, tras la atracción. Si el usuario tiene dos armas equipadas, ataca con ambas pero cada una inflige un −50 % menos de {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}daño{/g}.
Usar cualquiera de las dos capacidades activa la {g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}recuperación{/g} de ambas.

languages.text:
Der Nutzer erhält folgende {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}Fähigkeiten{/g}: {g|f:edd1a35b92d64bad9aaa09bbaa522797}Kraftpaar (mit Gegner){/g} und {g|f:cd63f0732da44952a78f7f79e50c737f}Kraftpaar (mit Verbündetem){/g}.
{g|f:edd1a35b92d64bad9aaa09bbaa522797}Kraftpaar (mit Gegner){/g} erlaubt dem Nutzer nach dem Heranziehen einen Angriff mit einer Nahkampfwaffe (sofern ausgerüstet). Hat der Nutzer zwei Waffen ausgerüstet, greift er mit beiden Waffen an, verursacht aber mit jeder Waffe −50 % weniger {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}Schaden{/g}.
Der Einsatz einer dieser Fähigkeiten startet für beide die {g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}Abklingzeit{/g}.

Der Nutzer erhält die {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}Fähigkeiten{/g} {g|f:edd1a35b92d64bad9aaa09bbaa522797}Kraftpaar (Gegner){/g} und {g|f:cd63f0732da44952a78f7f79e50c737f}Kraftpaar (Verbündeter){/g}.
{g|f:edd1a35b92d64bad9aaa09bbaa522797}Kraftpaar (Gegner){/g} erlaubt dem Nutzer nach dem Heranziehen einen Angriff mit einer Nahkampfwaffe (sofern ausgerüstet). Hat der Nutzer zwei Waffen ausgerüstet, greift er mit beiden Waffen an, verursacht aber mit jeder Waffe −50 % weniger {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}Schaden{/g}.

languages.text:
Kullanıcı, {g|f:edd1a35b92d64bad9aaa09bbaa522797}Zorla Eşleme (düşmanla){/g} ve {g|f:cd63f0732da44952a78f7f79e50c737f}Zorla Eşleme (dost birimle){/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}kabiliyetlerini{/g} kazanır.
{g|f:edd1a35b92d64bad9aaa09bbaa522797}Zorla Eşleme (düşmanla){/g} kabiliyeti sayesinde kullanıcı, yakın dövüş silahı kuşanmışsa hedef düşmana çekildikten sonra bu silahla o düşmana saldırabilir. Kullanıcı, iki silah birden kuşanmışsa her ikisiyle birlikte saldırır ancak her biri %50 daha az {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}hasar{/g} verir.
Bu kabiliyetlerden herhangi biri kullanıldığında ikisi birden {g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}dolum süresine{/g} girer.
languages.original_text:
The user gains the {g|f:edd1a35b92d64bad9aaa09bbaa522797}Force Couple (with enemy){/g} and the {g|f:cd63f0732da44952a78f7f79e50c737f}Force Couple (with ally){/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g}.
{g|f:edd1a35b92d64bad9aaa09bbaa522797}Force Couple (with enemy){/g} allows the user to attack the target enemy with a melee weapon, if they have one equipped, after the pull. If the user has two weapons equipped, they attack with both of them, but each deals −50% less {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}.
Using either of those abilities sets both of them on {g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}cooldown{/g}.

Kullanıcı, iki silah birden kuşanmışsa her ikisiyle birlikte saldırır ancak her biri %50 daha az {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}hasar{/g} verir.
Bu kabiliyetlerden herhangi biri kullanıldığında ikisi birden {g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}dolum süresine{/g} girer.

Kullanıcı, {g|f:b3617f252b704125bfd60cc4702af97f}Zorla Eşleme (Düşman){/g} ve {g|f:cd63f0732da44952a78f7f79e50c737f}Zorla Eşleme (Dost){/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}kabiliyetlerini{/g} kazanır.
{g|f:b3617f252b704125bfd60cc4702af97f}Zorla Eşleme (Düşman){/g} kabiliyeti sayesinde kullanıcı, yakın dövüş silahı kuşanmışsa hedef düşmana çekildikten sonra bu silahla o düşmana saldırabilir. Kullanıcı, iki silah birden kuşanmışsa her ikisiyle birlikte saldırır ancak her biri %50 daha az {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}hasar{/g} verir.
Bu kabiliyetlerden herhangi biri kullanıldığında ikisi birden {g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}dolum süresine{/g} girer.

languages.text:
L'utilisateur obtient les {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacités{/g} {g|f:edd1a35b92d64bad9aaa09bbaa522797}Couple de forces (avec un ennemi){/g} et {g|f:cd63f0732da44952a78f7f79e50c737f}Couple de forces (avec un allié){/g}.
{g|f:edd1a35b92d64bad9aaa09bbaa522797}Couple de forces (avec un ennemi){/g} lui permet d’attaquer la cible ennemie avec une arme de mêlée s’il en est équipé, après l’effet d’attraction. Si l'utilisateur est équipé de deux armes, il attaque avec les deux simultanément, mais chacune inflige des {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}dégâts{/g} réduits de −50 %.
L'utilisation de l'une ou l'autre de ces capacités déclenche leur {g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}temps de recharge{/g} à toutes les deux.
languages.original_text:
The user gains the {g|f:edd1a35b92d64bad9aaa09bbaa522797}Force Couple (with enemy){/g} and the {g|f:cd63f0732da44952a78f7f79e50c737f}Force Couple (with ally){/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g}.
{g|f:edd1a35b92d64bad9aaa09bbaa522797}Force Couple (with enemy){/g} allows the user to attack the target enemy with a melee weapon, if they have one equipped, after the pull. If the user has two weapons equipped, they attack with both of them, but each deals −50% less {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}.
Using either of those abilities sets both of them on {g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}cooldown{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
L'utilisateur obtient les {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacités{/g} {g|f:edd1a35b92d64bad9aaa09bbaa522797}Couple de forces (avec un ennemi){/g} et {g|f:cd63f0732da44952a78f7f79e50c737f}Couple de forces (avec un allié){/g}.
{g|f:edd1a35b92d64bad9aaa09bbaa522797}Couple de forces (avec un ennemi){/g} lui permet d’attaquer la cible ennemie avec une arme de mêlée s’il en est équipé, après l’effet d’attraction. Si l'utilisateur est équipé de deux armes, il attaque avec les deux simultanément, mais chacune inflige des {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}dégâts{/g} réduits de −50 %.
L'utilisation de l'une ou l'autre de ces capacités déclenche leur {g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}temps de recharge{/g} à toutes les deux.

L'utilisateur obtient les {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacités{/g} {g|f:b3617f252b704125bfd60cc4702af97f}Couple de forces (ennemi){/g} et {g|f:cd63f0732da44952a78f7f79e50c737f}Couple de forces (allié){/g}.
{g|f:b3617f252b704125bfd60cc4702af97f}Couple de forces (ennemi){/g} lui permet d’attaquer la cible ennemie avec une arme de mêlée s’il en est équipé, après l’effet d’attraction. Si l'utilisateur est équipé de deux armes, il attaque avec les deux simultanément, mais chacune inflige des {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}dégâts{/g} réduits de −50 %.
L'utilisation de l'une ou l'autre de ces capacités déclenche leur {g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}temps de recharge{/g} à toutes les deux.

languages.text:
使用者获得{g|f:edd1a35b92d64bad9aaa09bbaa522797}力偶（敌人）{/g}和{g|f:cd63f0732da44952a78f7f79e50c737f}力偶（盟友）{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:Ability}能力{/g}。
{g|f:edd1a35b92d64bad9aaa09bbaa522797}力偶（敌人）{/g}可让使用者在牵引后，使用装备的近战武器对该敌人发起攻击。如果使用者装备了两把武器，则使用两把武器同时攻击，但每把武器的{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}伤害{/g}降低50%。
使用其中任意一项能力，两项能力都会进入{g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}冷却{/g}。
languages.original_text:
The user gains the {g|f:edd1a35b92d64bad9aaa09bbaa522797}Force Couple (with enemy){/g} and the {g|f:cd63f0732da44952a78f7f79e50c737f}Force Couple (with ally){/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g}.
{g|f:edd1a35b92d64bad9aaa09bbaa522797}Force Couple (with enemy){/g} allows the user to attack the target enemy with a melee weapon, if they have one equipped, after the pull. If the user has two weapons equipped, they attack with both of them, but each deals −50% less {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}.
Using either of those abilities sets both of them on {g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}cooldown{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
使用者获得{g|f:edd1a35b92d64bad9aaa09bbaa522797}力偶（敌人）{/g}和{g|f:cd63f0732da44952a78f7f79e50c737f}力偶（盟友）{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:Ability}能力{/g}。
{g|f:edd1a35b92d64bad9aaa09bbaa522797}力偶（敌人）{/g}可让使用者在牵引后，使用装备的近战武器对该敌人发起攻击。如果使用者装备了两把武器，则使用两把武器同时攻击，但每把武器的{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}伤害{/g}降低50%。
使用其中任意一项能力，两项能力都会进入{g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}冷却{/g}。

languages.text:
使用者は{g|f:b3617f252b704125bfd60cc4702af97f}Force Couple (Enemy){/g} と{g|f:cd63f0732da44952a78f7f79e50c737f}Force Couple (Ally){/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}のアビリティ{/g} を得る。これらのアビリティのいずれかを使用すると、{g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}両方のクールダウンが設定される{/g} 。
使用者が{g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}近接武器{/g} を2つ装備している場合、その両方で攻撃するが、 それぞれが与える{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}ダメージは-50%減少する{/g} 。
languages.original_text:
The user gains the {g|f:b3617f252b704125bfd60cc4702af97f}Force Couple (Enemy){/g} and the {g|f:cd63f0732da44952a78f7f79e50c737f}Force Couple (Ally){/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g}. Using any of those abilities sets both of them on {g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}cooldown{/g}.
If the user has two {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} weapons equipped, they attack with both of them, but each deals −50% less {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}.
